title: After end run screen, where should the player go?
question: end_run_screen.gd:12 currently routes to SceneRencontreMerlin (to delete). After run ends, where should the player land?
options: A: HubAntre (continue managing Oghams and start next run)

context: Director previously said delete SceneRencontreMerlin. The logical post-run destination in the bible is Hub 2D. FLOW-ENDRUN-NEXT-SCENE-FIX will implement the chosen option.
